Title: All Along the Watchtower
Comment: I was 6 or 7 when I first heard this song at home with my parents. My grandpa, he heard it first at his fire base in Vietnam on the good morning Saigon radio show. While he was working as an artilleryman, showering with water contaminated with agent orange, and caring for an orphan boy with one eye. Everytime I hear it I think about the juxtaposition of our first listening experiences and how many homeless Vietnam vets are thinking to themselves "there must be some kind of way out of here"
